name: Command Animals
tooltip: Summons 2 Anima's to fight for you. + They will attack your target in melee range, using their Feral Bite to deal Slashing Damage to your foes. The Bite has a 30% chance to Poison the target, Snaring them and dealing Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec. + The Animal can also Lunge at your target, Knocking Down the target, removing travel powers, and dealing Crushing Damage. + New skills are acquired upon ranking this power

name: Cower
tooltip: Wipes your threat from your target. + Placates targets, preventing them from attacking you. + Applies Fear to you, debuffing your damage. + Places you in Stealth for 4/5/6 sec. + Sets your other threat wipe abilities on a 30 cooldown.

name: Howl
tooltip: Nearby foes become Feared, reducing their damage by 10% for 12 sec. + Applies 1/2/3 stack of Furious to you and nearby allies. Furious gives you +1.5% Critical Chance, this effect can stack up to 3 times. + When taking damage Furious grants you Willpower, which gives you +300 Health Points over 3 sec. + Applies Moonlight Howl to you for 30 sec.

name: Last Stand
tooltip: Can only be used while Defeated. + You are brought back from defeat gain +100% Health Points, Increased Maximum Health Points, Regeneration and resistance to all damage for 15 sec. + You also become Immune to most forms of Control effects and gain 200% resistance to all Knock effects. + After 15 sec, reduces your health by 90% and you are Immune to all healing effects for 10 sec. + Activates a shared cooldown of 90 sec on all Active Defenses. + Activates a shared cooldown of 300 sec on all Resurrections.

name: Moonstruck
tooltip: Knocks Down nearby targets. + Drops a Healing Rune which heals nearby allies every 1 sec for 10 sec. + You cannot have more than one Rune out at a time.

name: Tear Down
tooltip: Lunges at the target, dealing Slashing Damage to the target and to enemies within a 15ft cone behind the target +. Targets are Knocked Down. + Has a 50% chance to apply Bleed to affected targets, causing Slashing Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Thrash
tooltip: Deals Slashing Damage every 0.5 sec. + Heals you for every one of your Wounds on the target. + If your target is affected by Deep Wound, heals you for a greater amount in addition to other Wound effects. + Snares your target, reducing their movement speed by 100%.

name: Violent Roar
tooltip: Grants a 42/50/60% increase to all damage. + Increases your Strenght and Recovery by 35/42/50 points. + Increases the amount of Energy your Recovery gives. + Applies Break Free damage to any Holds, Roots, or Disables affecting you. + Can be used while Held or Confused. + Activates a shared cooldown of 90 sec on all Active Offenses.

name: Brutal Charge
tooltip: Lunges at the target, dealing Slashing Damage to targets within 10 ft.+ Knocks Up targets depending on how far you lunge from. If your target is immune to Knock effects, increases this power's base damage by 30%. + Applies Disorient to your primary target, reducing their damage by 10% and movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

name: Eviscerate
tooltip: Deals Slashing Damage to your target. + When not fully charged, adds 8 sec to the duration of your Bleeds. This cannot exceed the regular duration of the Bleed effects. + When fully charged, consumes all Bleeds and applies Deep Wound, causing increased Slashing Damage every 2 sec for 16 sec for each Bleed consumed. This effect ignores Dodge, Shields and half of the target's Resistance. + While Deep Wound is active you cannot apply any other Bleeds. Deep Wound cannot be refreshed or stacked.

name: Massacre
tooltip: Deals Slashing Damage and your target is Knocked Down.

name: Infernal Bolts
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage and generates Energy. + Initial hit has 15% chance to apply Deadly Poison. + Deadly Poison deals 38 Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks up to 5 times.

name: Infernal Blast
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage. + Has a 25-100% chance to apply Deadly Poison to your target. + Deadly Poison deals 38 Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks up to 5 times.

name: Lash
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage. + Has a 25/25/50% chance to apply Deadly Poison to your target. + Deadly Poison deals 38 Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks up to 5 times.

name: Aspect of the Infernal
tooltip: Gives you a stacking buff that increases your ranged damage, as well as your melee damage to a lesser degree. + You gain a stack each time you apply or refresh a Poison. + Each time you gain a stack, existing stacks are refreshed and you gain energy. + Stacks up to 8 times, lasts 20 sec, and can only gain 1 stack every 4 sec. + Increases energy costs by 10%.

name: Condemn
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage to affected targets. + Applies Deadly Poison to each target if they are not currently affected by it, otherwise, has a 10% chance to apply another stack of Deadly Poison. Deadly Poison deals Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks up to 5 times.

name: Devour Essence
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage and heals you every 0.5 sec. + Snares your target.

name: Life Essence
tooltip: Heals you, and your allies within 20ft for half the amount. + If your target is affected by a type of Poisons, instead heals nearby allies for the full amount Health Points.

name: Mephitic
tooltip: Whenever you apply or refresh a Poisons, you gain Energy every 3 sec for 6 sec. + Poisons includes: Deadly Poison, Debilitating Poison, Noxious Poison + The energy gained scales with your Intelligence, and to a lesser degree, your Recovery. + This effect does not stack, but can be refreshed

name: Vicious Cyclone
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage every 0.5 sec to all targets and each target has a 10% chance to Knock Back targets. + Has a 10% chance to apply Deadly Poison to your target. Deadly Poison deals Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks up to 5 times.

name: Vile Lariat
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage. + Your target is Knocked to you. + Has a 46-100% chance to apply Deadly Poison to your target. Deadly Poison deals Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks up to 5 times.

name: Voodoo Doll
tooltip: While blocking, 250/300/360% resistance to all Damage. + Increases your resistance to Holds and Knocks, and reduces your movement speed. + Gives you energy when struck by an attack while blocking. This amount scales with your Recovery and the amount of damage you take. + Deals Toxic Damage back to the attackers if you are struck by an attack while blocking.

name: Crippling Coils
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage and has a 15% chance to apply Deadly Poison to your target. + After maintaining this power for 1 sec, it Incapacitates the target for up to and refreshes a portion of the duration and durability of the Incapacitate every 1 sec you maintain it. + Deadly Poison deals Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks up to 5 times.

name: Curse
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage to affected targets. The area effect of this power is increased by 10 ft if you are affected by the Pestilence power. + Stuns targets for a short time. + If a target is affected by 5 or more Poisons, Paralyzes them instead for 12 sec.

name: Death's Embrace
tooltip: Revive. Revives a nearby ally, bringing them back to life with 33/66/100% Health, based on rank.

name: Entrancing
tooltip: Wipes your threat from the target and places you in Stealth for 4/5/6 sec + Shares a 30 sec cooldown with other Threat Wipe abilities.

name: Epidemic
tooltip: Deals increasing Toxic Damage every 0.5 sec to nearby targets and has a 15% chance to apply Deadly Poison to your target. + Fully maintaing this power will double the number of stacks of Deadly Poison on affected targets. + Deadly Poison deals Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks

name: Locust Swarm
tooltip: Paralyzes the target. + While the target remains Paralyzed, they suffer Toxic Damage every 1 sec.

name: Will-o'-the-Wisp
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage. + Applies Debilitating Poison to your primary target, suffering -18% resistance to Toxic Damage for 15 sec. + Applies Deadly Poison to your secary targets, dealing Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec.

name: Defile
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage. + Has a 13-50% chance to apply Deadly Poison to your target. + Deadly Poison deals Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec and stacks up to 5 times.

name: Rebirth
tooltip: Can only be used while Defeated. + You are brought back from defeat and fully healed. + For the next 20 sec, you lose a certain amount of Health Points of your Maximum Health every 1 sec for 20 sec. + During this time you also gain +100% all damage strength, +1 00% resistance to all damage, and gain +8.3% Health Points upon defeating any enemy. + Places all Resurrection powers on a 300 sec cooldown.

name: Pestilence
tooltip: You deal additional Toxic and Slashing Damage. + You gain Elemental Damage Resistance and additional Toxic Damage Resistance. + You affect foes within 10 ft and foes that you attack with Pestilence, which deals Toxic Damage every 2 sec. The amount of damage starts lower, but reaches that amount as the target gets Iow on health. + Reduces your foes resistance to your Toxic damage by 2% for each stack of your Deadly Poison on them. + Reduces your foes resistance to your Slashing damage by 2% for each stack of your Bleed on them.  + In addition, Healing effects on the target are reduced by 100%.

name: Regeneration
tooltip: You gain Health every 3 sec. This amount changes based on damage taken. +  Additionally you gain 20/25/30% resistance to all damage. This value is reduced as you take damage.

name: Supernatural Power
tooltip: Whenever you use a Supernatural power that reduces your energy below 15% of your maximum, you gain a large amount of Energy. + Scales with your Recovery better than most other energy unlocks.

name: Venomous Breath
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage every 0.5 sec to all targets. + Has a 15% chance to apply Deadly Poison targets, causing Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec.

name: Resurgence
tooltip: Heals you for 50/75/100% Health Points, and increases ytour Maximum Health point by 833/1000/1200 for 15 sec. +  Increases your Regeneration by 5/10/15%. + Can be used while Held or Confused. + Activates a shared cooldown of 90 sec on all Active Defenses.

name: Soul Mesmerism
tooltip: Paralyze the target.

name: Corrosive Pit
tooltip: Deals Toxic Damage to all targets. + Creates a Corrosive Pit at your primary target for 16 sec. + Corrosive Pit deals Toxic Damage every 1 sec for 16 sec to targets within 25ft. Hits up to 10 targets. + Has a 15% chance every 1 sec to apply Deadly Poison to your targets, dealing Toxic Damage every 1 sec over 16 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. + Applies Noxious Poison to targets affected by your Deadly Poison, dealing Toxic Damage every 1 sec over 16 sec to foes within 10ft. + Targets in the Corrosive Pit are Snared, reducing their movement speed by 100%.

name: Feral Rage
tooltip: Applies Break Free damage to any Holds, Roots, or Disables affecting you. + Grants you 250/300/360% resistance to Hold and Knock effects. + Increases your resistance to all damage. If you are affected by Regeneration, instead increases its effectivement. + Increases your Bestial Supernatural base attack damage for each stack of Enrage on you. +  Your Bestial Supernatural attacks gain a chance to inflict Bleed on your targets for each stack of Enrage on you. + Attacking targets heals you for each stack of your Bleed on the target. +  Increases your Running Speed. + When this power ends, removes all Form stacks from you. + Can be used while Held or Confused. + Activates a shared cooldown of 90 sec on all Active Offenses and Active Defenses.

tooltip: Grants +20 Flight Speed while active. Outside of combat, you build up speed over time. After 4 sec, you gain +17 Flight Speed. After 10 sec, you gain an additional +17 Flight Speed. While active, you suffer a -12% penalty to Power Cost Discount and your Energy Building strength is reduced by 15%.
